docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT NEXT DOOR SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-07-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-09-2002
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARBARA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER RE: COMPLEX CASE DESIGNATION - DENIED
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST BARBARA WILLIAMS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-07-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-22-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: YVONNE LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-22-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-22-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-23-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-23-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST BARBARA WILLIAMS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-23-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-08-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-23-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-04-2002 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-22-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-07-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
